javax.media.mscontrol.resource
Interface AllocationEventNotifier

All Known Subinterfaces:
MediaGroup, MediaMixer, MixerAdapter, NetworkConnection, ResourceContainer
public interface AllocationEventNotifier

Characteristics of objects able to send AllocationEvent's.

Method Summary
 void addListener(AllocationEventListener listener)
          Add a listener class.
 MediaSession getMediaSession()
          Gives access to the MediaSession on which this event belong to
 void removeListener(AllocationEventListener listener)
          Remove a listener that was previously added
 

Method Detail

addListener

void addListener(AllocationEventListener listener)
Add a listener class. The listener will be called when the operation completes.

removeListener

void removeListener(AllocationEventListener listener)
Remove a listener that was previously added

getMediaSession

MediaSession getMediaSession()
Gives access to the MediaSession on which this event belong to

Returns:
Media Session from which the associated listener belong to
